text: Sharad singh Mobile Application Developer Faridabad,Haryana (121001 ) - +91 9899780308. singhsharadO95@gmail.com -_LinkedIn -_Github ABOUT ME Results-driven Mobile Application Developer with 7 Months of specialized experience in React Native development and full-stack solutions.
